name: Gratuity Calculator India

before.shortDescription: Use RupeeKit's Gratuity Calculator to estimate your gratuity in India. Get an accurate calculation based on your last drawn salary and years of service.
before.metaDescription: Use RupeeKit's Gratuity Calculator to estimate your gratuity in India. Get an accurate calculation based on your last drawn salary and years of service.

after.shortDescription: Estimate your gratuity in India with RupeeKit's calculator. Get an accurate estimate based on your last drawn salary and years of service, considering the Gratuity Act, 1972.
after.metaDescription: Calculate your potential gratuity in India using RupeeKit's free online tool. Understand how your last drawn salary, service years, and Gratuity Act

changeSummary: Refined shortDescription and metaDescription for clarity and SEO compliance.
Expanded formulaExplanation and example for better user understanding and word count.
Added two new FAQs to provide more comprehensive information.
Introduced 'howToUse' section with clear, step-by-step instructions.
Added 'assumptions' section to clarify the basis of calculations.
Included 'commonMistakes' section to help users avoid errors.
Created four 'contentSections' to enrich the page with relevant information on gratuity in India, its factors, tax implications, and calculator benefits.
Ensured all content adheres to brand, privacy, and output rules, focusing on India context and conservative, finance-safe language.
